paths.title: Complete Security Foundations
paths.description: All 31 lessons in module order. Full course coverage from security mindset through detection imperative.

paths.title: CTF and Offensive Techniques Fast Track
paths.description: Offensive attack patterns, exploitation techniques, and persistence mechanisms. Skips defensive-only lessons. ~15 lessons.

paths.title: Defensive Operations and Detection Focus
paths.description: Prioritises detection signals, telemetry correlation, and hardening controls. Full defensive context with just enough offensive coverage to understand what is being detected.

paths.title: Cryptography and PKI Track
paths.description: Complete cryptographic foundations: symmetric encryption, CBC attacks, AEAD, key exchange, forward secrecy, TLS policy, hash functions, password KDFs, and PKI chain validation.

paths.title: Windows Authentication and Endpoint Defence
paths.description: Windows-focused path: NTLM/Kerberos attack surface, registry forensics, Pass-the-Hash, Kerberoasting, event log correlation, persistence detection, and layered authentication controls.
